printed.name: Triceps Prone
printed.setup: Lying prone on Wunda Chair, arms straight, shoulders over wrists, hands placed on pedal, palms facing back, legs straight and together, feet plantarflexed, body parallel to Mat

movement.exhale: Straighten arms, lowering pedal, return to start position

cues: Keep legs and trunk stable and parallel to Mat
Keep elbows close to sides of trunk when bent
